text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, Tazuna pays a visit to my<n>office.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer! I hope I'm not<n>interrupting
anything!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Only a handful of students at the<n>academy have
been able to find such<n>success over the past
three years.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy that I could watch over<n>you both
this entire time! ♪
choice_data_list: Thank you for working so hard for our sakes!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Would you and your trainee care to<n>join me after
this?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But let's buy some apples for<n>everyone first!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, the three of us feast on<n>ramen and
pan-fried dumplings.
